case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. TYMOFIY DOTSENKO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-05-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DOTSENKO, TYMOFIY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-16-2017
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17313026) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DOTSENKO, TYMOFIY
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 61579921) FILED BY ATTORNEY RUIZ, ABRIL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-05-2017 CONTINUED TO FEB-06-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE DEC-05-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS, (TRANSACTION ID # 61579921): RUIZ, ABRIL ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR DISCOVER BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61579921)
